name: The Waterpark
description:
The Pop Palace company just opened up a new waterpark near where you lived. You had a number of friends go there and come back with bodies that were completely different. In some instances you had friends not come back at all. It made you very curious to check out this waterpark for yourself.

[inflation, popping, expansion, deflation, blueberry, helium]

This is based on the story by pop-palace called: The Waterpark

Photo by Art-Man-1999
creator: bobibone
